title: Mureka Unveils Studio and Remix, Advancing Its Vision for an AI-Native Music Creation Era
description: SINGAPORE, March 20, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Mureka, the AI-powered music creation platform developed by Skywork AI, today announced the release of two new capabilities - Studio and Remix - as part of its continued push to redefine how music is imagined, created, and evolved in the age of artificial intelligence.

title: New Hire At Meta Expresses Fear Of Dismissal Before Even Starting Amid Layoff Cycle
description: This development comes amid Meta's latest round off layoffs as it transitions into integrating artificial intelligence more and more in its products.
content:
A new hire at Meta expressed their fear of being fired from their job despite having not formally started at the company yet.

title: China's Alibaba targets $100B in AI and cloud revenue over 5 years
description: Chinese tech giant Alibaba plans to earn over 100 billion dollars from its artificial intelligence and cloud businesses in the next five years. This ambitious goal comes as the company reported a significant profit drop in its latest quarter. Alibaba's cloud business, however, showed strong growth.

title: China's Alibaba targets $100B in AI and cloud revenue over 5 years
description: China’s Alibaba Group has pledged on Thursday a goal of surpassing $100 billion in revenue from its artificial intelligence and cloud businesses over the next five years, which it says would be powered by the AI demand boom.
